revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q8266276}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Bengali-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q8266276}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Bengali-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q8266276}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Bengali-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q8266276}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Bengali-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]
